transcript: You're in rather a good mood. I suppose I am. You won't ask why. Small pleasures. Your Grace, Lord Tywin. Prince Oberyn. I don't believe you have met Hilaria. This is the Lord Hand, Tywin Lannister, and Cersei Lannister, the Queen Regent. I suppose it is former Queen Regent now. Lord Hand, Lady Cersei. Hilaria's son. My lord, my lady. John. I've never met a Sand before. We are everywhere in Dorne. I have ten thousand brothers and sisters. Bastards are born of passion. One day, we don't despise them in Dorne. No? How tolerant of you. I expect it is a relief, Lady Cersei, giving up your regal responsibilities. Wearing the crown for so many years must have left your neck a bit crooked. Suppose you'll never know, Prince Oren. It's a shame your older brother couldn't attend the wedding. Please give him our regards. With any luck, the gout will abate with time and he'll be able to walk again. They call it the rich man's disease. No wonder you don't have it. No woman in my part of the country don't enjoy the same lifestyle as our counterparts in dorm people everywhere have their differences in some places the highborn frown upon those of low birth in other places the rape and murder of women and children is considered distasteful what a fortunate thing for you former queen regent that your daughter myrcella has been sent to live in the latter sort of place everyone silence clear the floor there's been too much amusement here today a royal wedding wedding is not an amusement. A royal wedding is history. Time has come for all of us to contemplate our history. My lords, my ladies, I give you King Joffrey Renly Stannis, Robb Stark, Baelon Greyjoy, the War of the Five Kings! I'm the rightful king! King of the Lord! Yes! Ha-ha! Ha-ha-ha am the king of the seven kingdoms! Let the war begin! Ridley, you're no king! Away, degenerate! Away, away! Careful! You're my prince! You like it there? Go on, up! Who's got the net now, Stark? I'm the......rightful king. Challenge me, Kraken! I'm drowning! I'm drowning! And I'm the king. Challenge me, Kraken. I'm proud of you. I'm proud of you. And I'm the king in and of. Pay each of them 20 gold when this is done. Yes, my lord. I'll have to find another way to thank the king. Charge! Ready. Again. I'm the king of the North! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! George! I don't know. Champion's purse. Though...you're not the champion yet, are you? A true champion defeats all their challengers. Surely there are others out there who still dare to challenge my reign? Uncle, how about you? I'm sure they have a spare costume one taste of combat was enough for me your grace i would like to keep what remains of my face i think you should fight him this was but a poor imitation of your own bravery on the field of battle i speak as a first-hand witness. Climb down from the high table with your new Valyrian sword and show everyone how a true king wins his throne. Be careful, though. This one is clearly mad with lust. It would be a tragedy for the king to lose his virtue hours before his wedding night. fine vintage shame that it spilled did not spill my love come back to me it's time for my father's toast well how does he expect me to toast without wine We'll be right back. did not spill my love come back to me it's time for my father's toast well how does he expect me to toast without wine uncle you can be my cupbearer seeing as you're too cowardly to fight your grace does me a great honor. It's not meant as an honor. Bring me my goblet. What good is an empty cup? Fill it. Kneel. Kneel before your king kneel I said kneel look the pie Kneel! Look, the pie! My queen. Wonderful. Wonderful. My hero. Can we leave now? Let's find out. Uncle? Where are you going? You m my cupbearer, remember? I thought I might change out of these wet clothes, Your Grace. No, no, no. No, you're perfect the way you are. Serve me my wine. Hurry up, this pie is dry. Mmm, good. Knees washing down. If it please Your Grace, Lady Somza is very tired. No, you wait here. Your grace. It's nothing. He's choking! I'm the poor boy. I'm the poor boy. Idiots, help your king! Move away! Geoffrey! Geoffrey! Geoffrey! Geoffrey! Come with me now. Geoffrey! Geoffrey! If you want to live, you have to leave.
